subcodes.first_line: The wings of the peacock of the sacred garden are outspread in the heart of Paradise; blessed, then, are they that behold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد انتشر اجنحه طاوس حدیقه القدس فی بحبوحه الفردوس فطوبی للناظرین قد اثمرت
subcodes.subjects: @mystical themes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @rejection, opposition and persecution
